name: Financial Hardship Declaration & Assistance Request
description: A formal letter declaring financial hardship and requesting assistance, relief, or a payment plan from an institution or creditor.
content:
From:
{{applicant_name}}
{{address}}
Phone: {{phone}}

Date: {{formatDate letter_date}}

To:
{{institution_name}}
{{city_state}}

RE: Declaration of Financial Hardship / Request for {{assistance_requested}}

To Whom It May Concern,

I am writing to formally declare my current state of financial hardship and to request your assistance regarding {{assistance_requested}}. My current employment/occupational status is: {{occupation_status}}.

Applicant Details:

  • Full Name: {{applicant_name}}
  • ID / SSN: {{ssn_id_number}}
  • Date of Birth: {{formatDate dob}}
  • Marital Status: {{marital_status}}
  • Total Number of Dependents: {{dependents_count}}

Financial Summary:

  • Estimated Total Monthly Income: {{monthly_income}}
  • Primary Source(s) of Income: {{income_sources}}
  • Estimated Monthly Essential Expenses (Rent, Utilities, Food, Medical): {{monthly_expenses}}
  • Significant Assets (if any): {{assets}}

Reason for Hardship:

Due to unforeseen and difficult circumstances, I am currently unable to meet my basic financial obligations. The specific details of my hardship are as follows:

{{hardship_explanation}}

I kindly request that you review my situation and consider granting the assistance or relief I am applying for. I have attached the necessary supporting documentation to corroborate my current financial standing.

{{#if attached_documents}}

Enclosures/Attachments:

{{attached_documents}}
{{/if}}

I certify that the information provided in this declaration is true, accurate, and complete to the best of my knowledge.

Sincerely,

_________________________
{{applicant_name}}

fields.name: institution_name
fields.label: Name of the Institution / Creditor
fields.placeholder: e.g., Housing Authority, Bank of America, Charity Foundation

fields.name: hardship_explanation
fields.label: Explanation of Hardship
fields.placeholder: Explain the circumstances (job loss, medical emergency, etc.).

fields.name: assistance_requested
fields.label: Type of Assistance Requested
fields.placeholder: e.g., Rent Assistance, Payment Deferral, Food Stamps

fields.name: attached_documents
fields.label: Attached Documents (List them)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Bank Statements, Medical Bills, Eviction Notice
